"Roger Zelazny was one of SF's finest storytellers, a poet with an immense and instinctive gift for language. Reading Zelazny is like dropping into a Mozart string quartet as played by Thelonious Monk." -GREG BEAR Volume 3s This Mortal Mountain covers the late 1960s and early 1970s, when Zelazny's breadth of interests developed into a variety of styles displayed in such rich stories as "This Mortal Mountain," "The Steel General," "Damnation Alley," "The Man Who loved the Faioli," and the Hugo and Nebula-nominated "The Engine at Heartspring's Center." "Roger Zelazny is one of our very finest writters, a master of prove both sinewy and lyrical, a teller of tales evocative, suspemeful, thought-provoking." -POL ANDERSON "Nobody else makes myths real and valuable in the way Roger Zelazny could." -NEIL GAIMAN 2504 978-1-886778-78-8 52900> 9 781886 778788 Price: $29 ISBN 978-1-886778-78-8 Z f THE COLLECTED STORIES OF ROGER ZELAZNY VOLUME THREE THIS MORTAL MOUNTAIN
